rationale: The cited paper appears once in the background section as an example of prior work in a different setting (new consumer packaged goods category) that examined sales-distribution feedback. In this citing paper, that mention is used to contextualize the literature and contrast with the authors' focus on mature automobile dealer networks and buyer-level choice modeling. There is no direct reuse of Bronnenberg et al.'s dynamic framework, measures, or empirical approach in the core model or results.
